notes: Feature semantic cards for GPT symbolic-spec generation. Definitions follow current 0410_feature code behavior. EM atom features are raw/unclipped; do not assume every EM atom is in [0,1].

embedding_similarity.definition: EM grouped feature family for row-level embedding agreement.
embedding_similarity.caution: Group token; if replay provides atomic features, prefer atomic names directly.

row_value_overlap.definition: EM grouped feature family for row value/token set overlap.
row_value_overlap.caution: High values can still come from shared boilerplate values.

row_profile.definition: EM grouped profile similarity on non-empty/numeric/length statistics.
row_profile.caution: Profile similarity is weak evidence without lexical/value overlap.

serial_value_alignment.definition: EM grouped row-serialization alignment family (lexical + numeric overlap).

ditto_proxy.definition: Deprecated alias of serial_value_alignment (kept for backward compatibility).

serial_lexical_plus.definition: EM grouped extra lexical separability features.
serial_lexical_plus.caution: Character n-gram similarity may be high for templated strings.

header_alignment.definition: EM grouped PromptEM-like schema/value alignment features.
header_alignment.caution: Useful only when header cues are reliable in source data.

jaccard_containment.definition: JTS grouped overlap score between column value sets.
jaccard_containment.caution: Directional containment is often more stable than plain jaccard.

value_distribution.definition: JTS grouped token distribution similarity feature family.
value_distribution.caution: In current implementation this is header-token JS similarity, not full value histogram.

overlap_coverage.caution: Coverage can be unstable for tiny columns.

value_profile.caution: Profile similarity alone does not guarantee joinability.

header_similarity.caution: Header-only evidence is brittle; pair with value/overlap evidence.

value_stats.caution: Sensitive to missing-value handling and small sample columns.

value_overlap.caution: Low overlap does not always imply mismatch for synonym-heavy domains.

column_overlap.definition: UTS grouped directional column overlap family.
column_overlap.caution: Directional asymmetry matters; do not collapse blindly.

header_jaccard.definition: UTS grouped header token overlap family.
header_jaccard.caution: Header overlap can be noisy for generic names (id, name, value).

table_size_ratio.definition: UTS grouped table size compatibility family.
table_size_ratio.caution: Size ratio should be weakly weighted; same semantics can exist at different scales.

row_emb_cosine.caution: High cosine can be spurious for near-duplicate templates; value can be negative.

row_emb_l1_sim.definition: Inverse L1 distance similarity of row embeddings.
row_emb_l1_sim.caution: Monotonic but non-linear; avoid over-interpreting absolute scale.

row_value_jaccard.definition: Jaccard overlap of normalized row cell value sets.
row_value_jaccard.caution: Affected by normalization and null filtering.

row_value_containment_max.definition: Max directional containment between row value sets.
row_value_containment_max.caution: Asymmetric containment can be informative; max discards direction.

row_token_jaccard.definition: Token-level Jaccard overlap across row values.
row_token_jaccard.caution: Can be inflated by common stop-like tokens.

row_nonempty_ratio.definition: Similarity of non-empty cell counts between rows.
row_nonempty_ratio.caution: Rows with very sparse values are noisy.

row_numeric_ratio_sim.caution: Insensitive when both rows have low numeric density.

row_avg_len_ratio.definition: Similarity of average cell string lengths.
row_avg_len_ratio.caution: Length similarity is weak semantic evidence.

row_serial_token_jaccard.definition: Token Jaccard on row serialization text.

row_serial_edit_similarity.definition: Normalized edit similarity on serialized row text.
row_serial_edit_similarity.caution: For long strings implementation may use char-gram proxy.

row_numeric_value_overlap.definition: Max numeric value containment overlap between rows.
row_numeric_value_overlap.caution: Small numeric sets can make this unstable.

row_serial_char3_jaccard.definition: Character 3-gram Jaccard on serialized row text.

row_serial_char4_jaccard.definition: Character 4-gram Jaccard on serialized row text.
row_serial_char4_jaccard.caution: More brittle than 3-gram for short strings.

row_token_idf_jaccard.definition: IDF-weighted token Jaccard on row tokens.

row_numeric_rel_diff_sim.definition: Similarity from relative median numeric difference.
row_numeric_rel_diff_sim.range: [0,1] (set to 0 when either row has no numeric values)
row_numeric_rel_diff_sim.caution: Only informative when both rows have numeric values.

row_header_jaccard.caution: Weak when headers are generic or inconsistent.

row_header_value_exact_ratio.definition: Exact match ratio for shared headers' values.
row_header_value_exact_ratio.caution: Only works when header names align well.

row_header_token_jaccard.caution: Can be sparse for short rows.

jaccard.definition: Jaccard overlap of two column value sets.
jaccard.caution: May underestimate relation for subset-like joins.

containment_max.definition: Max directional containment between two column value sets.
containment_max.caution: Often more robust than jaccard in joinability.

value_distribution.definition: Similarity from Jensen-Shannon on token distributions.
value_distribution.caution: Current code uses tokenized column names, not full value histograms.

coverage_a.definition: Coverage of column A by overlap with B.

coverage_b.definition: Coverage of column B by overlap with A.

coverage_max.definition: Max directional coverage between two columns.

unique_ratio_sim.caution: Can be noisy on very small columns.

numeric_ratio_sim.caution: A coarse profile feature; weak alone.

avg_len_ratio_sim.caution: Length can correlate with format rather than semantics.

header_token_jaccard.caution: Sensitive to tokenization and naming style.

header_edit_similarity.definition: Normalized edit similarity on raw header strings.
header_edit_similarity.caution: High for lexical variants that may still be semantically different.

missing_ratio_sim.definition: Similarity of missing-value ratio between columns.
missing_ratio_sim.caution: Can dominate when data quality issues are shared.

value_jaccard.definition: Jaccard overlap for schema-matching value sets.
value_jaccard.caution: Low overlap may still happen for semantically matched columns.

value_containment_max.definition: Max directional value containment for schema matching.
value_containment_max.caution: Containment is asymmetric; max compresses direction.

col_overlap_a2b_mean.definition: Directional mean best-column overlap from table A to B.
col_overlap_a2b_mean.caution: Can be high even when only subset of columns match strongly.

col_overlap_b2a_mean.definition: Directional mean best-column overlap from table B to A.
col_overlap_b2a_mean.caution: Use jointly with A->B direction to detect asymmetry.

col_overlap_a2b_cov.definition: Directional coverage of strongly matched columns A->B.
col_overlap_a2b_cov.caution: Depends on threshold tau in implementation.

col_overlap_b2a_cov.definition: Directional coverage of strongly matched columns B->A.
col_overlap_b2a_cov.caution: Interpret with its opposite direction together.

header_jaccard.definition: Header token set Jaccard between two tables.

col_count_ratio.definition: Ratio similarity of number of columns.
col_count_ratio.caution: A structural prior; not semantic evidence by itself.

row_count_ratio.definition: Ratio similarity of number of rows.
row_count_ratio.caution: Can vary due to sampling not semantics.

s_prior.definition: Prior probability score from base model before symbolic correction.
s_prior.caution: Already model-dependent; avoid overfitting symbolic rules to it.

uncertainty.caution: High uncertainty means borderline, not necessarily wrong.

src_degree.definition: Graph degree of source node for current candidate edge.

dst_degree.definition: Graph degree of destination node for current candidate edge.

degree_ratio.caution: Undefined at zero is mapped to 0 in implementation.

gnn_score.definition: GNN predicted probability for the pair.
gnn_score.caution: Do not use as sole symbolic feature to avoid degenerate identity mapping.

overlap_mean_max.definition: Derived UTS feature: max of directional overlap means.

overlap_cov_max.definition: Derived UTS feature: max of directional overlap coverages.

overlap_direction_gap.definition: Derived UTS feature: directional gap of overlap means.
overlap_direction_gap.caution: Large gap can imply subset relation, not necessarily mismatch.

size_balance.definition: Derived UTS feature: min structural size ratio.
size_balance.caution: Too strict thresholds may hurt recall.
